hero.title: Own the Agentic AI That Solves the Problem
hero.description: We are not an AI-agent design tool. BatBot builds owned AI systems that solve concrete industry problems: ingest your docs, workflows, code, and business data; ship an AI product with login, billing, failover, and continuous improvement.
hero.statement: Agentic AI is not a design prompt. BatBot turns knowledge, tools, permissions, billing, and resilient model supply into an operable product system.

announcement.title: From Barbot to Pi Agent: turn hard problems into usable AI

hero.tip: ⚡ Owned model supply. Owned knowledge. Owned business loop.
hero.avatars_tip: Trusted by hardware and procurement engineers

logos.title: Three layers. One platform. Any industry.

introduce.title: What We Build
introduce.label: Agentic AI Company
introduce.description: BatBot does not wrap models in a chat box. We decompose concrete problems into knowledge, tools, permissions, model supply, and commercial loops. You fully own the AI system, and it runs on your data, product rules, and growth model.

items.title: Industry Knowledge OS
items.description: Turn docs, specs, standards, tickets, and internal expertise into an AI-ready knowledge layer that is searchable, citable, and continuously updated.

items.title: Model Supply & Failover
items.description: Route by plan, quota, model cost, and provider health. Fail over silently when the primary model breaks, then switch back when it recovers.

items.title: Commercial AI Product Loop
items.description: Login, payment, subscriptions, usage, billing, and entitlement are part of the product, so the AI can be sold to real users.

items.title: Project-Based Delivery
items.description: Barbot, Pi Agent, Coding Agent, and enterprise knowledge systems can be composed around one concrete problem and shipped as an operable AI product.

benefits.title: Why Our AI Is Stronger
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: We do not sell a generic chat wrapper. We turn your business problem into an AI system you can own, launch, charge for, and improve.

items.title: Built Around a Concrete Problem
items.description: We define the job, success criteria, model mix, knowledge structure, tools, and evaluation loop first. The goal is not to chat; it is to complete work.

items.title: You Fully Own It
items.description: Data, configuration, permissions, pricing, model supply, and usage records live in your system instead of depending on one model vendor or external UI.

items.title: Commercial From Day One
items.description: Free/Pro/Team entitlements, Alipay payment, active subscriptions, model access, fallback billing, and Included/On-demand usage share one loop.

usage.title: From Problem to Owned AI
usage.description: We ship operable AI products, not prompt demos.

items.title: Define the Concrete Problem
items.description: Clarify who the AI works for, what job it completes, how success is measured, and how it fails safely.

items.title: Connect Your Assets
items.description: Bring in docs, code, workflows, accounts, pricing plans, internal APIs, and business databases so the AI works in real context.

items.title: Build the Executable Agent
items.description: Compose model supply, tools, permissions, memory, citations, and fallback rules into a stable AI workflow.

items.title: Launch and Keep Improving
items.description: Use real conversations, usage, billing, fallback events, and E2E regression tests to make the system stronger over time.

features.title: Agentic AI Capabilities Built for Launch
features.description: From model supply to the commercial loop, everything is built for real users.

items.title: Model Supply Layer
items.description: Plan entitlement, visible model lists, quota pools, cost multipliers, provider priority, and fallback chains in one decision layer.

items.title: Login and Payment Loop
items.description: New users start Free. Alipay payment creates an active subscription, and Pro access is applied immediately.

items.title: AI Web Chat
items.description: Users only see models allowed by their plan. Auto is the recommended default; premium models draw from the same quota pool.

items.title: AI Coding Agent
items.description: Pi Agent Web UI, Coding Agent, and domain knowledge can share the same entitlement and model supply foundation.

items.title: Failover and Recovery
items.description: When the primary model returns 500, 429, timeout, or streaming-first-byte failure, requests switch to backup and later recover.

items.title: Traceable Usage and Billing
items.description: Record requested/actual model, provider, fallback reason, Included/On-demand usage, and estimated cost.

testimonials.title: What Engineers Say
testimonials.description: Real feedback from hardware and procurement engineers using BatBot.

items.name: Hardware Engineer
items.quote: It feels like having a senior FAE on call. I get the datasheet answer while I'm still at my bench.

items.name: Procurement Engineer
items.quote: Component selection used to take hours of datasheet hunting. BatBot cuts that to minutes.

items.name: Embedded Developer
items.quote: The coding agent understands register maps and SDK quirks. It's not just autocomplete — it actually knows the hardware.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Talk to our team.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform.

items.question: What makes BatBot different from a generic AI chatbot?
items.answer: BatBot is built around a proprietary virtual file system and engineer-facing doc site. The agent reasons over structured, versioned, traceable domain knowledge — not a generic index. Engineers also get a real doc site they use daily, not just a chat interface.

items.question: Can BatBot work for industries outside electronics?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is industry-agnostic. Load any vertical's documentation and the agent becomes that domain's expert. Electronics is our first production vertical; others are in progress.

items.question: What content can BatBot ingest?
items.answer: Datasheets, application notes, reference designs, standards, internal documentation, FAQs, and training materials. Custom ingestion pipelines are available for non-standard formats.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Token usage is bundled with your subscription plan — no per-API charges. Enterprise plans include private deployment and custom data pipeline setup.

items.question: How long does deployment take?
items.answer: A standard vertical deployment takes days, not months. Data ingestion, doc site setup, and agent configuration can be completed in a single sprint.

items.question: Is private or on-premise deployment available?
items.answer: Yes. Enterprise plans include private deployment options for data-sensitive environments.

cta.title: Ready to Deploy Your Domain Expert AI?
cta.description: Start with the electronics vertical or bring your own industry data. BatBot's platform is ready.

subscribe.title: Stay Updated

brand.title: BatBot
brand.description: BatBot is an agentic AI platform for industry-specific expert assistants — powered by a proprietary virtual file system, engineer-facing doc site, and composable agent layer.
